meta.intent: Push the packet into sharp late tension with three rescues and dense mixed blockers while keeping each pivot readable enough to feel fair.
meta.expectedPath: Commit fully to the lower-left rescue first, pivot hard into the middle-right target second, and only then spend actions on the safer top rescue.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player brute-forces low-value clears across the whole board, never really commits, and loses either to dock overflow or to water catching the first urgent puppy.
meta.whatItProves: The Phase 1 seed scales into real tension without collapsing into busywork.
meta.notes: Density is concentrated near target lanes so the board stays parseable instead of becoming uniformly noisy.
